betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Basic Ingredients§f

§aProduce flour, dough, butter, and cooking oil as recipe foundations.§f

Most HarvestCraft recipes require intermediate ingredients. Key production chains:

§6Flour§f: Grinder(grain) or Mortar and Pestle(grain) → Flour
§6Dough§f: Mixing Bowl → Flour + Water
§6Batter§f: Mixing Bowl → Flour + Egg + Milk
§6Butter§f: Juicer → Heavy Cream + Salt
§6Cooking Oil§f: Juicer or Presser → Seeds/Nuts
§6Sugar§f: Presser → Sugar Cane
§6Tofu§f: Presser → Soybean → Silken Tofu (2 from Soybean)
§6Fresh Water§f: Water Filter → Woven Cotton (8 water + 8 salt)
§6Salt§f: Water Filter byproduct
